jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Biocon - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Biocon in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Biocon:
Biocon is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon!
